text:
Really strange then.
I have 10.0 amd64 machine, procfs is mounted, WITH_NEW_XORG set,
options for nvidia-driver-331.49 follows:
Options        :
        ACPI_PM        : off
        DOCS           : on
        LINUX          : off
        WBINVD         : off

Mikhail
